assertions.name: generates-observability-scripts
assertions.check: At least 2 observability-related scripts are generated (e.g., log.sh, metrics.sh, health.sh, trace.sh)

assertions.name: scripts-are-executable-logic
assertions.check: Scripts contain actual executable logic (not just placeholder comments)

assertions.name: references-project-structure
assertions.check: Scripts reference the actual project structure (src/, package/, telemetry, etc.)

assertions.name: assesses-observability-dimensions
assertions.check: Output includes assessment of O1-O4 observability dimensions
